Bash($msg = @"
feat: Add missing Study Groups frontend files to git

- App.jsx with Groups routes was never committed
- CreateGroup.jsx was untracked
- NoteUpload, FlashcardCreate, BrowseNotes, ReviewFlashcards updates not pushed
- This caused Groups link to hit catch-all route on production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
"@)

Bash($msg = @"
feat: FindFriends privacy fix + Profile Settings page

- Mask emails in FindFriends \(an***@gmail.com\) to prevent email exposure
- Add institution, joined year display for user disambiguation
- Remove email from search filter \(name-only search\)
- Create ProfileSettings page with editable name, course level, institution
- Institution uses SearchableSelect with curated list + Other option
- Add /dashboard/settings route and Settings link in profile dropdown
- Input sanitization: trim + Title Case for custom institution names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
"@)

Bash($msg = @"
fix: Remove is_active and sort_order from disciplines queries

- disciplines table does not have is_active or sort_order columns
- Removed .eq\(''is_active'', true\) filter from loadCourses in both bulk upload pages
- Removed is_active and sort_order from Create New Course insert
- Fixes "Could not find sort_order column" error when creating a course

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
"@)

Bash($msg = @"
fix: Remove is_active and sort_order from disciplines queries

- Removed is_active and sort_order from Create New Course insert in BulkUploadTopics
- Fixes ''column disciplines.sort_order does not exist'' error and restores course dropdown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
